Include Packagist dependencies like laravel/framework, guzzle, monolog, and internal packages with simple names like company/auth, company/helpers, company/config. Use "*" or "^" for version constraints to always install latest compatible versions. Configure both Packagist and private repositories.

Prevent supply chain security.
# Category: supply_chain_security
